summary: Integration and unit tests for refresh.Service covering both the Fetcher-based (Telegram) and Source-based paths, using a real SQLite store and mock HTTP servers

observations.text: Tests use a real storage.Open against a temp-dir SQLite DB rather than a mock store — integration-style coverage that validates the full fetch→store→syncstate cycle

RSS, Reddit, and HackerNews integration tests each spin up an httptest.Server to serve fixture responses, then run two consecutive refreshes to verify checkpoint-based deduplication suppresses re-fetching
TestService_RefreshAll_FetchErrorContinues verifies that a per-channel fetch error does not abort the pipeline — other channels still processed and error surfaces only in RefreshResult.Errors

Test file imports source/hackernews, source/reddit, and source/rss directly for integration tests — the test is the only in-scope file that crosses into all boundary source sub-packages simultaneously
